name: Chocolate Extasy
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt together butter and 3/4 cup semisweet chocolate chips. Set aside to cool.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together 10 tablespoons sugar, 4 egg yolks, and 2 tablespoons flour until well combined. Add the melted chocolate mixture when it is cooled and stir thoroughly.
3. Beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the chocolate batter.
4. Pour the batter evenly into a greased 9x13-inch baking pan (9 x 13 inches). Bake at 350°F for 18 minutes, or until set.
5. Allow the cake to cool completely, then spread with a thin layer of raspberry preserves (optional).
6. Whipped Cream Layer: In a large bowl, whip together 1 pint whipping cream and 1 tablespoon sugar until stiff peaks form. Spread evenly over the cooled cake.
7. Refrigerate the cake until ready to serve.
8. For the Glaze: Melt together 1/2 cup heavy cream, 2 teaspoons instant coffee, and 1 1/4 cups semisweet chocolate chips in a saucepan. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Stir well before pouring over the whipped cream layer of the cake. Tilt the pan to ensure even distribution.
9. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
